overview: A full-stack ERP Customer Ledger Dashboard for managing customers, sales invoices, receipts, and calculating account balances. Features a dashboard with KPI cards, customer master management, sales entry with invoice printing, receipt entry with payment modes, and individual customer ledger views with monthly breakdowns.
features: Dashboard with KPI cards (Total Customers, Sales, Receipts, Outstanding)
Customer Master with auto-generated codes and full profile management
Sales Entry with add/edit and printable invoices
Receipt Entry with payment modes (Bank, Cash, Check, Online) and printable receipts
Individual customer ledger with month-by-month balance breakdown
Closing balance auto-calculated (Opening Balance + Total Sale - Total Receipts)
Pre-populated sample data with Indian Rupee formatting
